title: Telangana Govt issues detailed guidelines for Musi rejuvenation Phase-I; December 2027 deadline for project completion
description: Telangana Cabinet sub-committee on May 8, 2026, directs officials to start construction work of the initial phase spanning five km within 21 km stretch from Himayatsagar to Bapughat and Osmansagar to Bapughat with minimal impact
